<!--
DISCLAIMER:

Thanks for contributing to skiLLM.

⚠️ Before continuing, ensure your contribution is DIRECTLY related to reusable AI/developer skills, workflows, tooling, prompts, or markdown-based agent capabilities.
Generic markdown files, random prompts, AI-generated spam, low-effort wrappers, or unrelated resources will be rejected.

📝 Before submitting this pull request:

- Read the contribution guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md
- Ensure your contribution follows the repository structure and naming conventions
- Keep pull requests focused and minimal
- Do NOT submit unrelated formatting or mass refactor changes
- Do NOT include API keys, credentials, telemetry, tracking scripts, obfuscated code, or any personal info
- Ensure all markdown renders correctly on your forked repository
- Test all examples, commands, scripts, and workflows before submitting
- Search existing skills/modules first to avoid duplicates

For new skills/modules:

- Each skill must be self-contained and practically reusable
- Include clear instructions, expected usage, and examples
- Prefer real workflows over theoretical explanations
- Keep dependencies minimal
- Use descriptive names and consistent formatting

Before opening the PR:

- Fill out the entire PR template
- Link related issues/discussions if applicable
- Verify that your changes only modify files relevant to this contribution
- Ensure the repository remains clean and organized

Low-quality, duplicated, misleading, auto-generated, or non-functional contributions may be closed without merge.
-->
